debug_info.goal:
case some.some.none
𝕜 : Type u_3
α : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
inst✝² : DiscreteMeasurableSpace α
inst✝¹ : Fintype α
inst✝ : RCLike 𝕜
f g : α → 𝕜
p q : NNReal
hr₀ : none ≠ 0
hpqr : ENNReal.HolderTriple (some p) (some q) none
⊢ ‖f * g‖ₙ_[none] ≤ ‖f‖ₙ_[some p] * ‖g‖ₙ_[some q]

failed_attempts: simpa using (cLpNorm_mul_le_top (f := f) (g := g) (p := (p : ℝ≥0∞)) (q := (q : ℝ≥0∞)))

simpa using (cLpNorm_top_le_of_le (f := f * g) (g := ‖f‖ₙ_[⊤] * ‖g‖ₙ_[⊤]) <| by
      intro a
      simpa [Pi.mul_apply, norm_mul, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using
        (mul_le_mul (cLpNorm_top_le (f := f) a) (cLpNorm_top_le (f := g) a)
            (by positivity) (by positivity)))

simpa using (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := f * g) (by
        simpa [ENNReal.none_eq_top] using (show (r : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ∞ from le_top))).trans <|
      (by
        simpa [cLpNorm_top, iSup_mul] using
          mul_le_mul'
            (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := f) (by
              simpa [ENNReal.none_eq_top] using (show (p : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ∞ from le_top)))
            (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (f := g) (by
              simpa [ENNReal.none_eq_top] using (show (q : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ ∞ from le_top))))

simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (f := f) (g := g) (p := p) (q := q)
      (by
        simpa using hr₀) (hpqr := hpqr))

simpa [cLpNorm_top] using
      (cL1Norm_mul (f := f) (g := g)).trans_le
        ((mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (nnnorm_wInner_cWeight_le_dLpNorm_mul_dLpNorm (𝕜 := 𝕜) (f := fun a ↦ ‖f a‖) (g := fun a ↦ ‖g a‖) (p := (some p)) (q := (some q)) (by
              simpa using hpqr.holderConjugate)).2)
          (by positivity))

simpa using (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (f := f) (g := g) (p := (p : ℝ≥0∞))
      (q := (q : ℝ≥0∞)))

simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (le_trans (by simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (cLpNorm_mul_le_mul_cLpNorm_top f g))
      (mul_le_mul_of_nonneg_right (by simpa [cLpNorm_top] using (cLpNorm_le_cLpNorm_of_exponent_le (by simp) (by simp) (f := f)) ) (by positivity)))

simpa using (cLpNorm_mul_le_cLpNorm_mul_cLpNorm (f := f) (g := g) (p := (p : ℝ≥0∞))
      (q := (q : ℝ≥0∞)) (r := (0 : ℝ≥0∞)) hr₀)

have : (‖f * g‖ₙ_[∞] : ℝ≥0) ≤ (‖f‖ₙ_[∞] : ℝ≥0) * (‖g‖ₙ_[∞] : ℝ≥0) := by
      simpa [cLpNorm_top, Pi.mul_apply] using
        (nnnorm_mul_le (f := fun a : α ↦ f a) (g := fun a : α ↦ g a))
    exact_mod_cast this
